name: Matrix Eye 4
comment: GLP Matrix Eye 4: Caution when working in Mode 3. This mode is based on virtual dimmers for all heads. The Red Shift function (Dimmer Mode) only works when using the original dimmer (default in Mode 3 100% Open)

modes.name: Mode 5 Pixelmap RGB Virtual Dim (12 ch)

gwSpecs.description: Caution when working in Mode 3. This mode is based on virtual dimmers for all heads. The Red Shift function (Dimmer Mode) only works when using the original dimmer (default in Mode 3 100% Open)
